capture_method: Manual local replay against the committed routing fixture and current SKILL.md contract.

observed_output_sections.heading: what DevTools changed
observed_output_sections.content: The prompt points to post-import drift: DevTools likely imported the wrong root, added template residue, rewrote shared config, or left a stale compile condition that changed the start page.

observed_output_sections.heading: what should remain in the repo
observed_output_sections.content: Keep the intended repo root, the real miniapp code root, tracked `project.config.json` and `app.json` values, and any genuine app pages or components that existed before the DevTools-side drift.

observed_output_sections.heading: what to delete or restore
observed_output_sections.content: Restore tracked config files first, then delete only generated template pages, wrong-root residue, or stale compile-condition side effects that are not part of the intended project shape.

observed_output_sections.heading: what the user must change in DevTools
observed_output_sections.content: Re-import the correct directory, clear any stale custom compile condition, and make sure DevTools is pointed at the intended miniapp root instead of a generated subfolder or template shell.

notes: Captured as a replayable prompt-and-answer sample. This is transcript-backed local evidence, not a live installed-skill router transcript.
